feature_health_cards.notes: Improved from V4.1 49% but still above target. Queries A2, A4, B1, B2, E1 escalated via post-hoc grep. Reranker now runs (variance skip removed) but confidence values for multi-term queries still below medium threshold (0.35).
Variance skip removed in V4.2. All queries now get reranked. Score range 0.27-1.67 (calibrated Voyage reranker scores), vs V4.1 0.001-0.314 (raw RRF scores).

A3 (pharmacy API error) correctly classified as DEBUG. E4b (investigate bug) correctly classified. E4 primary query (investigate failure) classified as CODE — 'failure' does not match soft keyword 'fail' (exact word matching). Expanded DEBUG detection helps but word boundary matching limits coverage.
